languages.text: Призвал{mf||а} архмилитанта следовать собственным убеждениям, не слушая окружающих.

languages.text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.
languages.original_text: Призвал{mf||а} архмилитанта следовать собственным убеждениям, не слушая окружающих.

languages.text: 大軍勢に、自分の信念に従い他人の意見を無視するように促した。
languages.original_text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.

traits.locale_text: 大軍勢に、自分の信念に従い他人の意見を無視するように促した。

languages.text: 你敦促首席战士坚持她自己的信念，别管别人怎么说。
languages.original_text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.

traits.locale_text: 你敦促首席战士坚持她自己的信念，别管别人怎么说。

languages.text: Başmilitan'ı, kendi inançlarına bağlı kalmaya ve başkalarının fikirlerini görmezden gelmeye teşvik ettin.
languages.original_text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.

traits.locale_text: Başmilitan'ı, kendi inançlarına bağlı kalmaya ve başkalarının fikirlerini görmezden gelmeye teşvik ettin.

languages.text: Instaste a tu Archimilitante a ser fiel a sus convicciones e ignorar las opiniones ajenas.
languages.original_text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.

traits.locale_text: Instaste a tu Archimilitante a ser fiel a sus convicciones e ignorar las opiniones ajenas.

languages.text: Vous avez poussé l'archimilitante à suivre ses propres convictions et à ignorer l'avis des autres.
languages.original_text: Urged the Arch-Militant to adhere to her own convictions and ignore other people's opinions.

traits.locale_text: Vous avez poussé l'archimilitante à suivre ses propres convictions et à ignorer l'avis des autres.

languages.text: Die Erzmilitantin gedrängt, ihren Überzeugungen zu folgen und die Meinung der Leute zu ignorieren.
